title: My next update is live on my automated trading bot, V1.2
author: No_Page5992
selftext:
Hey all!

This is my next update.  
I've encountered some complications on the last version.  
The main issue was the bot not taking enough trades, while it should.  
Me and my partner found out this was mainly caused due to wrong analysis method of the bot.  
This has all been re-worked.

Also in this update, our TP mechanics has been completely re-worked. The bot now take partials the way it should and in the way my strategy describes.

In this test-run i've tested EURUSD in the time from 1st of January this year to this date.  
In this period, the bot managed to win an super nice % profit of 67%.

My bot is a multi-timeframe bot, which means it finds it bias on the high timeframe, it confirms this bias on the middle timeframe, and the execution timeframe is the lowest one, while it confirms the bias on this timeframe once again to be certain price wants to go to the direction it had analysed.

It uses structure points for TP's, whenever price broke through the structural high/low on the execution timeframe, it will take a partial there, and move SL to BE, since we expect price to move higher to break the structural high of the confirmation timeframe, which will be the last TP.

I will not share this bot in any way, the only thing i will be doing whenever this bot is finished, is start a copy-trade program for people to profit with me.  
I have a server in which i show many more test-results, and all explanations needed to understand this bot yourself, there will be no costs for this.

What do you guys think? All feedback is welcome.
